features.name: Project Baseline Verification
features.description: Project installs cleanly, all tests pass, import smoke checks succeed, init.sh runs without errors
features.evidence: pytest tests/ -v passes (110 tests); import smoke checks pass; init.sh runs clean

features.name: Structure Generation Pipeline
features.description: Bulk, surface, defect, adsorbate, and dopant modules produce valid ASE Atoms objects for Ni, perovskite, and fluorite systems
features.evidence: Modules implemented: bulk.py, surface.py, adsorbates.py, defects.py, dopants.py, decomposition.py, exsolution.py. Tests in test_smoke.py cover imports and instantiation.

features.name: VASP Calculator Interface
features.description: VASPInputGenerator produces correct INCAR/KPOINTS/POSCAR for relaxation, frequency, and NEB workflows
features.evidence: VASPInputGenerator importable and tested in CI lint job

features.name: Analysis and Thermochemistry
features.description: Energetics, thermochemistry, microkinetic, RDS, and surface comparison modules provide post-processing for DFT results
features.evidence: Modules implemented: energetics.py, thermochemistry.py, microkinetic.py, rds.py, surface_comparison.py, electronic.py

features.name: Doped Fluorite Electrolytes (GDC/YSZ/ScSZ)
features.description: Dopant module supports multiple fluorite hosts and dopant species with correct charge compensation
features.evidence: Generalized in commit ea26b63; tutorial at tutorials/doped_fluorite.md; analyze_dopant_distribution generalized with host_cation param, 7 regression tests; ce_total backward-compat alias added for Ce hosts

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/structure/ (8 files)
features.description: Audit structure subpackage for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues.
features.evidence: Fixed 2 bugs (cluster atom count, molecule fallback). Added 4 regression tests. Merged in commit 61880cf.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/calculators/ (8 files)
features.description: Audit calculators subpackage for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues.
features.evidence: Fixed 5 bugs (INCAR case mismatch, Hubbard U f-orbital, VDW key case, cm-1 conversion, is_converged false positive), 12 regression tests. Merged in commit 61880cf.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/analysis/ (8 files)
features.description: Audit analysis subpackage for bugs, unit/sign errors, and type inconsistencies.
features.evidence: Fixed 2 bugs (DOSCAR LORBIT=11, set_bulk_energy). 6 regression tests. Merged in commit 61880cf.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/workflows/ (7 files)
features.description: Audit workflows subpackage for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues.
features.evidence: Fixed 3 bugs (get_gibbs_energy TypeError, couple_with_decomposition wrong kwarg, NEB dead code), 5 regression tests. Merged in commit 71db775.

features.name: Audit: nh3sofc/database/ + core/ (7 files)
features.description: Audit database and core subpackages for bugs, type inconsistencies, and lint issues.
features.evidence: Fixed 3 bugs (get_surface_atoms z_threshold, asedb miller abs(), get_decomposition_energies miller format), 6 regression tests.

features.name: Import v3 plan tasks into feature-list.json
features.description: Import all tasks from nh3sofc_code_review_and_plan_v3.md into feature-list.json. Closes harness gap H2.
features.evidence: All 20 tasks (T0.1-T4.3) imported. Plan spec at docs/plans/nh3sofc_code_review_and_plan_v3.md.

features.name: Add breaking-change policy to CLAUDE.md
features.description: Add to Working Rules: renaming/removing any public API or returned dict key requires a deprecation shim for one minor version. Closes H3.
features.evidence: Deprecation shim rule added to CLAUDE.md Working Rules section.

features.name: Add metrics ratchet to Definition of Done
features.description: Add 'metrics ratchet tests pass via ./init.sh' to CLAUDE.md Definition of Done. Activates after T0.4 lands.
features.evidence: Metrics ratchet line added to Definition of Done in CLAUDE.md.

features.name: Create metrics script, ratchet test, and baseline
features.description: Create scripts/metrics.py (AST-based, not regex): counts total functions, annotated functions, print() calls, broad/bare excepts. Emits metrics_baseline.json. Add tests/test_metrics_ratchet.py enforcing no-worse-than baseline.
features.evidence: scripts/metrics.py (AST+tokenize), tests/test_metrics_ratchet.py (4 tests), metrics_baseline.json generated. Baseline: funcs=530, annotated=448 (84.5%), prints=226, excepts=21. 114 tests passing.

features.name: Fill ORACLE.md with Ni benchmark
features.description: Primary oracle: MKM-predicted apparent Ea and reaction orders (NH3, H2) for NH3 decomposition on Ni vs literature. Limiting-case test: analytic two-step network solved by analysis/microkinetic.py (tol 1e-8). Implement as pytest regression.

features.name: Begin Ni benchmark campaign
features.description: Assemble literature energetics for NH3 decomposition on Ni, run MKM, log to EXPERIMENTS.md with KEEP/DISCARD. This is the master plan's Phase 4.5 validation.

features.name: Record scientific gaps from Ni benchmark
features.description: Record scientific gaps found during T1.2 (missing thermochemistry corrections, solver issues) as new features. Science drives the engineering backlog.

features.name: CI: add ruff, mypy, coverage gates
features.description: Extend .github/workflows/ci.yml with ruff check + format, mypy nh3sofc/, pytest --cov --cov-fail-under=<current>. Migrate black+isort config to ruff. Ratchet: coverage floor only goes up.

features.name: Mirror CI checks in init.sh
features.description: Mirror ruff, mypy, coverage, and T0.4 ratchet test in init.sh so local verification == CI.

features.name: Fix deprecation warning in tests
features.description: Fix deprecated call at tests/test_smoke.py:254; set filterwarnings = ["error::DeprecationWarning"] in pytest config.

features.name: Fix or remove broken CLI entry point
features.description: Implement minimal nh3sofc/cli/main.py (--version, info) or delete [project.scripts]. Add entry-point test.

features.name: Migrate workflows/ and calculators/ to logging (dedicated)
features.description: Migrate print() to logging in workflows/ and calculators/ — platform prerequisite for parseable execution logs. Add core/logging_config.py. Separate mechanical commits per package.

features.name: Migrate remaining print() to logging (opportunistic)
features.description: All other packages: migrate prints when a module is touched for real work. Ratchet (T0.4) enforces monotonic progress and blocks new prints.

features.name: Narrow broad excepts (opportunistic)
features.description: Narrow, re-raise as package exceptions (core/exceptions.py: Nh3sofcError → CalculationError, ConvergenceError, StructureError), or delete. Create core/exceptions.py up front. Ratchet enforces trend.

features.name: Typing ratchet (opportunistic)
features.description: Annotate any function you touch; ratchet enforces fraction never decreases. mypy strictness raised per-module as modules reach full annotation.

features.name: Oversized-module splits (opportunistic)
features.description: Split defects/dopants/surface/adsorbates only when substantially modified. Pure-move commits protected by tests.

features.name: DFTProtocol dataclass with content_hash()
features.description: core/protocol.py: frozen DFTProtocol dataclass (functional, U map, ENCUT, k-spacing, dipole, magnetism init, D3 flag) with stable content_hash(). VASPInputGenerator requires a protocol. BLOCKS production DFT campaigns.

features.name: DB provenance stamping
features.description: database/asedb.py stamps every row: protocol hash, package version, git SHA, timestamp. Round-trip test. BLOCKS production DFT campaigns.

features.name: Golden-file INCAR test for production protocol
features.description: Golden-file INCAR test for pinned production protocol (ENCUT=520, U(V)=3.25, D3BJ) so protocol drift breaks CI.
